name: business-intelligence-platform
description: Production-ready business intelligence platform — 10,498+ APIs mapped to business outcomes, interactive dashboard, scheduled reports via email.

scripts.db:seed: bun run -e "import('./src/services/api-scanner').then(m => m.seedApiCatalog()).then(n => { console.log('Seeded', n, 'APIs'); process.exit(0); })"
